global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a logo, food illustration, and clear call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food options available nearby.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire banner.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'CraveLoop' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge with the text 'SALE' in a contrasting color, located at the top right.

elements.label: Food item illustration
elements.description: An illustration of two food items, represented by two stylized mirrors, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Food description
elements.description: Text below the food illustration that reads 'Fast food, fast favorites nearby' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A price tag displaying '€9.99' in a prominent font, located below the food description.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Learn more' in a bright color, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, CraveLoop logo, food illustration, sale badge
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the sale badge, food illustration in the center, body text below, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fast food, fast favorites nearby, €9.99, Learn more, CraveLoop, SALE
